name: Fallen God's Bloodlust
description: Converts a portion of your Attack Speed into Faster Cast Rate.

name: Wings of Hatred
description: Reduces landing diminish (capped at rank 1).

name: Holy Aura
description: Increases your and your party members attack damage and magic skill damage.

name: Roll the Dice
description: The die has been rolled.. if the crowns combined stats surpass 777 gain lady luck's blessing as bonus stats.

name: Teleport
description: Move through the ether for a short distance instantaneously.

name: Absolute Zero
description: Applies Cold Break on Attack.

name: Accelerated Flames
description: Increases the speed of your projectiles.

name: Adrenaline Momentum
description: chance to gain a stack of adrenaline momentum on hit increasing your movement speed and attack speed.

name: Age Proliferation
description: Channel waves of fractal energy on the target monster sending pulses out dealing arcane damage to nearby monsters.

name: Aimbot
description: All casts and attacks are targeted towards the closest target.

name: All Them Chickens
description: Cast to equip a chicken mask on Death.

name: Amun Ra's Demise
description: Monsters have a chance to explode on death dealing a portion of their maximum life as fire damage in a small area

name: Apocalyptic Thunder
description: Cast a high voltage thunder bolt on target spot stunning and dealing massive area of effect damage.

name: Apple Blast
description: Throw an apple in to the air that explodes in to small projectiles around you that deal Magic Damage.

name: Arch Angel's Fury
description: Cast to unleash apocalypse on small AOE around you dealing Magic Damage.

name: Armageddon
description: Call down a rain of meteors from the sky dealing area of effect fire damage to monsters struck.

name: Arrow Turret
description: Build an arrow turret that shoots arrows at the closest monster dealing arcane damage.

name: Australian Sport
description: Cast to throw a boomerang in towards target location dealing Damage on hit.

name: Avalanche
description: Release a bellowing shout dealing cold damage to all monsters around you and freezing them.

name: Baleful Aura
description: Increases magic skill damage and attack damage for all nearby party members.

name: Barrage of Rockets
description: Cast to launch 4 rockets towards nearest enemies dealing Damage on impact.

name: Benediction
description: When healed by your abilities, smite monsters around you with holy lightning.

name: Berserk
description: Every successful hit with berserk increases your attack damage, attack speed and movement speed for berserk stacking up to 8 times.

name: Blazing Trail
description: Leave behind a trail of fire dealing fire damage to monsters.

name: Blood Surge
description: Channel a massive surge of blood towards target direction dealing arcane damage to enemies in its path.

name: Blood Tendrils
description: Blood surge now causes its target to release blood tendrils for a portion of its damage.

name: Bluescreen of Death
description: Stun and deal Damage to literally everything on the screen.

name: Bone Spirit
description: Spawn a bone spirit that seeks out the nearest monster and explodes on impact, causing an Arcane damage explosion, then seeks out other mobs after the first impact.

name: Bone Storm
description: Summon a storm of bone and cartilage surrounding you dealing arcane damage.

name: Boost of Energy
description: Cast to drink cola that increases your Movement Speed for short period.

name: Booster Shot
description: When attacking have a chance to inject yourself with a mRNA gene altering shot temporarily increasing your attack damage and movement speed.

name: Bouncing Spikeball
description: Launch a bouncing spike ball towards target location dealing Damage on impact.

name: Burst of Speed
description: Gain increased movement speed for a short period after killing a monster.

name: Call of Steve
description: Cast to summon Stickman Steve to attack nearest enemies dealing Damage.

name: Candy Basket
description: Cast to summon a candy basket on target location that explodes after some time launching candy in air that deal Damage.

name: Candy Crush
description: Cast to launch candy around you exploding and dealing Magic Damage.

name: Cannon Turret
description: Build a cannon turret that launches cannonballs towards the nearest monster that explode into shrapnel, dealing area of effect arcane damage.

name: Card Throw
description: chance to throw a reverse card towards target on hit dealing a portion of the damage.

name: Celestial Creation
description: Chance on kill to cast your last used sentry skill.

name: Celestial Might
description: All Elemental Skill damage increases are converted to Arcane.

name: Chain Trap
description: Throw a chain trap into the target location dealing arcane damage and hooking nearby monsters with chains.

name: Chainsaw Massacre
description: Violently spin your chainsaw dealing damage to monsters around you. Going the full distance unleashes a whirl attack with increased damage and area of effect.

name: Chainsaw Mastery
description: Increases your damage and attack rating when using a chainsaw.

name: Chaos Unleashed
description: Causes your skills to rain down comets dealing fire damage for a short period of time

name: Charmed Blood
description: Your life leech lasts for longer without penalty.

name: Classic Tunes
description: Cast to play incredible solo that explodes in small AOE (because it’s so good) and deals Damage.

name: Combat Orders
description: Powerful warcry which buffs your and your party members maximum life and mana.

name: Commander´s Valor
description: Summons gain increased critical strike chance and critical strike damage.

name: Commanding Power
description: Shuts down any nearby portals..

name: Conjured Replenishment
description: Instantly recover full life and Mana, increasing your life replenish and mana replenish for a short period of time

name: Cornered
description: Your attacks cause monsters to get knocked back with increased damage, if they are knocked into the wall they get stunned.

name: Crippling Cold
description: Cast to strike enemies around you with Crippling Cold freezing and dealing Cold Damage.

name: Crushing Lance
description: Call a crushing lance down from the sky smashing the target location dealing area of effect physical damage.

name: Cursed Ground
description: Corrupt the ground in the target area inflicting poison break on monsters affected area.

name: Damage Reflect
description: Increases your damage return.

name: Dare to Read?
description: Holds a curse against Anubis.. Use with caution.

name: Deadly Whirl
description: Throw your weapon at the closest monster when striking a monster with Whirlwind or Chainsaw Massacre dealing physical damage.

name: Demolition Expert
description: chance to throw additional grenades.

name: Devout Doctor
description: Gain physical damage based on your maximum life.

name: Dissipation
description: Sand Guardians explode upon expiration dealing area of effect arcane damage.

name: Divine Healing
description: Using flash heal temporarily increases your life replenish.

name: Dragon's Presence
description: Inflicts monsters on flames when struck.

name: Dragon's Wrath
description: Executes monsters below a threshold.

name: Duck Throw
description: Throw a duck over your head that explodes in small AOE Magic Damage.

name: Empowered Sucking Power
description: Cast to suck in black holes.

name: Enraged Mania
description: Increase attack area of effect range and attack speed.

name: Execute
description: Deal extra attack damage to monsters below 30% Life.

name: Execution
description: Your melee physical attacks have a chance to execute low health monsters.

name: Explosive Kunai
description: Throw an explosive kunai that explodes and splits on impact, causing smaller explosions that deal Arcane damage.

name: Extract Heads
description: I argue that this talent does not exist.

name: Eye of the Storm
description: Increases your lightning skill damage.

name: Face Breakers
description: Increases your attack damage

name: Fallen Justice
description: When hitting monsters with a skill or an attack you have a chance to unleash a powerful earth shock at the target location dealing damage on a large radius.

name: Fanaticism Aura
description: When active, increases your and your party members attack speed.

name: Fast Slices
description: Perform a series of dashing attacks, dealing area of effect physical damage on second attack and stunning monsters around you on the final attack.

name: Fire Enchant
description: Enchant your attacks with additive fire damage inflicting burning on monsters. Your spells also apply a stack of Ignite.

name: Flail Mastery
description: Increase attack speed, attack damage and cast rate when using mace weapons.

name: Flailstrike
description: Cast to start spinning a flail dealing Damage to enemies hit.

name: Flash Heal
description: Heal yourself and any nearby allies.

name: Fleet Footwork
description: Increases your movement speed and gives you Phasing for a short period of time

name: Flying Darts
description: Cast to throw darts in a circle around you dealing Damage on hit.

name: Fortunate Aura
description: Increases magic find and experience gain for all nearby party members.

name: Frag Grenade
description: Throw a frag grenade dealing area of effect arcane damage launching shrapnel around.

name: Freezing Touch
description: Chance on any hit to freeze monsters. Get frozen your self when struck by anything. Cannot Be Frozen no longer works.

name: Frost Sunder
description: Unleash a barrage of piercing icicles dealing cold and physical damage freezing on hit.

name: Gamma Pulse
description: Send a wave of radiation that destroys nearby cloaking devices.

name: Gladiator's Roll
description: Roll the dice when attacking for a random effect.

name: Goburin's Greed
description: Gain a stack of goburin´s greed after monster kill increasing your magic find for a short duration.

name: Gunner Drone
description: Build a gunner drone which follows you and shoots bullets that bounce from monster to monster dealing arcane damage.

name: Hasteful Aura
description: Increases movement speed and cast rate for all nearby party members.

name: Healing Touch
description: Heals your self on cast.

name: Heavy Weight
description: Cast to drop a 1000kg weight on target location dealing Damage.

name: Hex Beast
description: Follower projectiles explode on impact dealing additional damage on a large radius.

name: Holy Hammer
description: Summon a holy hammer that spirals outwards dealing arcane damage on hit.

name: Homing Missile
description: Launch a barrage of homing missiles which seeks down its target dealing area of effect arcane and physical damage.

name: Honed Defenses
description: Every time you get hit by a monster attack gain stacks. At maximum stacks unleash a huge area of effect pulse dealing arcane damage to monsters around you. Can also be casted early to consume the stacks.

name: Jagged Gauntlet
description: Spells and attacks have a chance to deal increased damage based on your critical strike damage. This effect does not count as a critical hit. Your critical chance is halved and your critical damage is capped.

name: Lance Thrust
description: Perform a long ranged lance attack piercing monsters in a line dealing physical damage. If the lance comes in contact with a commending banner you get dragged to the banner smashing the ground stunning monsters on impact.

name: Laser Sight
description: Provides a visual reference point for better accuracy.

name: Last Stand
description: Restore yourself to full life and temporarily gain increased magic skill damage and physical damage reduction.

name: Lightning Fury
description: Strike monsters with increased attack damage causing lightning to chain between them dealing lightning damage.

name: Lingering Frost
description: Converts all elemental skill damage to cold skill damage. All skills now scale from cold damage.

name: Liquid Containers
description: Your left foremost potions are now permanently active with a portion of the power. You can no longer use potions.

name: Lost at Sea
description: Gives Walson a chance to cast Tsunami when attacking.

name: Lucky Dice
description: Cast to drop a Casino Dice on target location exploding and dealing Damage.

name: Lunar Aura
description: Increases your attack rating, additive arcane damage and all resistances

name: Magnum Opus
description: You can now roll critical strike multiple times until failure, every consequent critical strike roll lowers the chance of the next one.

name: Mana Bender
description: Converts a portion of your Energy into Magic damage.

name: Manalicious
description: Cast to instantly restore some Mana.

name: Manapool Aura
description: When active, increases your and your party members mana replenish.

name: Mass Hex
description: Cast to quickly poison all targets around you dealing Poison Damage.

name: Master Poisoner
description: Increases your poison skill damage.

name: Meat Hook
description: Cast to hook and pull the nearest enemy closer to you stunning them and dealing Damage.

name: Memes
description: Cast to read a random meme.

name: Molten Breath
description: Cast to breath fire towards target location dealing Fire Damage.

name: Molten Toothache
description: Cast to set enemies around you in flames for a short period dealing Fire Damage.

name: Mystic Sand
description: Increases your arcane skill damage and cast rate.

name: Nasty Flies
description: Cast to release a fly from the jar to your close proximity dealing Damage on hit.

name: Ninja Hooks
description: Cast to hook and pull 3 closest enemies towards you dealing Damage.

name: Noxious Strike
description: Unleash a poisonous strike dealing physical damage and  poison damage. Every third strike sends out piercing poisonous projectiles dealing damage and inflicting Poisoned on hit.

name: Oil Spill
description: Spill oil on the ground slowing and lowering monster attack rating. Oil also ignites into flames when coming in contact with Moonshine Molotov dealing additional burning damage.

name: Ominous Aura
description: When active, increases your and your party members arcane skill damage.

name: Omnislash
description: Become untargetable and rapidly strike monsters multiple times with increased attack rating dealing increased damage.

name: Parrot
description: Summon a parrot to peck your monsters dealing cold damage.

name: Parry
description: Gives you a chance to parry incoming attacks.

name: Phoenix Flight
description: Charge forward through the air dealing area of effect fire damage when landing.

name: Pipe Diver
description: Cast to teleport a short distance to target location.

name: Poison Breath
description: Unleash a rotten breath of toxins dealing poison damage.

name: Poison Nova
description: Unleash a toxic poison nova dealing poison damage and inflicting Poisoned on all monsters hit.

name: Portal of Ice
description: Teleport to the target location and release a frost nova dealing cold damage.

name: Power of the Ancients
description: Gain additional cold skill damage based on your mana.

name: Programmer´s Delirium
description: Increases the power of stats on your ring slots.

name: Pyro Technician
description: Blink into the closest monster to target location unleashing an area of effect attack dealing physical and fire damage.

name: Radiant Power
description: Gain magic skill damage based on your maximum mana for a short duration.

name: Rainbow Drool
description: Cast a rainbow beam forward that deals Magic Damage.

name: Raise Skeleton
description: Raise a skeleton warrior from target corpse to fight on your side.

name: Raise Skeleton Mage
description: Raise a skeleton mage from target corpse to fight on your side.

name: Reaper's Culling
description: You can no longer critically hit or miss the target and now deal increased physical damage.

name: Remiges
description: Increases your parrots cold damage and attack speed.

name: Returning Projectiles
description: Projectiles return after a short delay with reduced damage.

name: Revved Up
description: Temporarily increases your attack speed and damage.

name: Ricochet
description: Projectiles with physical damage bounce off of walls.

name: Rimskin Assassin
description: Your melee physical attacks have a chance to uppercut monsters launching them in to air stunning and dealing area of effect damage when landing.

name: Rocket Turret
description: Build a rocket turret that shoots rockets towards the nearest monster dealing area of effect arcane damage.

name: Sand Entombment
description: Chance on kill to unleash a pulse of sand dealing arcane area of effect damage.

name: Sand Gush
description: Unleash a gush of sand that spawns tornadoes dealing arcane damage.

name: Sand Vortex
description: Summon a massive vortex of quick sand that pulls monsters inside dealing arcane damage.

name: Sands of Time
description: Temporarily increase your arcane skill damage and cast rate.

name: Satanic Chant
description: When cast, temporarily boost your Damage.

name: Shadow Weave
description: Increases your Skill damage

name: Shield Slam
description: Strike with your shield dealing physical damage based on the defense of your shield.

name: Shocker 9000
description: Cast to launch an electric charge towards target location socking the enemy.

name: Single Out
description: Monsters that have no other monsters around them take increased arcane damage.

name: So Good
description: Cast to summon a pie on the ground that explodes after some time dealing Damage.

name: Soul Burst
description: Chance on kill to randomly gain increased movement speed, attack speed or faster cast rate.

name: Spontaneous Combustion
description: When igniting oil in flames, also make the monsters combust dealing area of effect fire damage around them.

name: Stoneskin Aura
description: Increases damage reduction for all nearby party members.

name: Storm Totem
description: Summon a totem that releases chain lightning on nearby monsters dealing lightning damage.

name: Stormy Javelin
description: Cast to throw a storm javelin towards target location that casts chain lightning dealing Lightning Damage.

name: Sucking Power
description: Cast to suck in enemies.

name: Suicidal Pig
description: Cast to summon Squishy the Suicidal Pig to run towards nearest enemy and drop a stone on itself dealing Damage.

name: Summon Mastery
description: Increases the life and arcane damage of all your summons.

name: Symphony of Thunder
description: Gain increased lightning damage for a short period of time also zapping all monsters with thunderbolts when hit by a lightning skill.

name: Temporal Heroes
description: Summon a fractal Viking, Pyromancer and Marksman to fight on your side.

name: The Shop is Open
description: Summon Torstein and his toys

name: Thorn of Vitality
description: Converts every point of Vitality into damage return.

name: Thunder Goddesses Chosen
description: Increases lightning skill damage.

name: To the Moon
description: Cast on target location to summon a Doge rocket that flies off and collides with the moon which causes moon fragments to rain back down dealing Damage. Much Wow.

name: Trampling Force
description: Portion of over capped movement speed added as attack damage and magic skill damage.

name: Trap the Fish
description: Cast to throw a net on the ground that catches fish.

name: Treasure Hunter
description: Search for a treasure from the corpses of dead monsters with additional magic find.

name: Unbound Power
description: Enables equipping any type of weapon.

name: Vector Shroud
description: Emits a portion of your total damage return to monsters within the auras range.

name: Walson's Aid
description: Walson orbits you and attacks monsters stunning and dealing area of effect cold damage.

name: Whirlwind
description: Spin your weapons around you dealing damage to monsters struck.

name: Wizard's Roll
description: Roll the dice when casting for a random effect.

name: Wrecking Ball
description: Increases the damage and range of Heavy Ball.

name: Zoooooom
description: Zoom Zoom Zoom!
